user.title: Hungry Machines
user.description: Enter your hungrymachines.io credentials. We use these to fetch your optimized schedules and apply them to your thermostat. Your password is sent once to api.hungrymachines.io to obtain access tokens; only the tokens are stored locally in Home Assistant.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Hungry Machines
reauth_confirm.description: Your saved credentials for {email} are no longer valid. Re-enter your password so the integration can keep applying your optimized schedule.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password — please try again.

init.title: Hungry Machines settings
init.description: Change which climate entity receives the optimized schedule.
